_comment: Curated cross-source edges for the LIVE (scraped) graph. Endpoints must be fully-namespaced node ids that exist in the real federated graph (e.g. misa::en). Empty for now: the original curated edges were authored against the synthetic fixture node ids (misa::investor_license, monshaat::funding_routes, ...) and were moved to tests/fixtures/kb/cross_entity/ with those fixtures. Re-author them here against real scraped node ids as the live data stabilises (and once geo-gated sources like monshaat are scraped via a Saudi proxy). Edges whose endpoints are absent are skipped and reported at build time, not dropped silently.
